query: SELECT CONCAT('+1', REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '')) as normalized_phone, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(phone) as phones FROM client_accounts WHERE phone NOT LIKE 'oauth:%' AND phone NOT LIKE '+%' AND LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '')) = 10 GROUP BY normalized_phone HAVING cnt > 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AafxdxuLDwTXdt.root --database Dw4mhfnuurFcniLsqjLpWN --execute SELECT CONCAT('+1', REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '')) as normalized_phone, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(phone) as phones FROM client_accounts WHERE phone NOT LIKE 'oauth:%' AND phone NOT LIKE '+%' AND LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '')) = 10 GROUP BY normalized_phone HAVING cnt > 1;
